{{CargoRelic
|name=Dung Beetle Travel Kit
|class_id=20842
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=The Dung Beetle Travel Kit is necessary for Dung Beetle soldiers, containing rations, gear, and basic weapons, enabling sustained combat operations for over a week.
|fame=18
|art=14
|fth=17
|civ=11
|tech=30
|ss1=prop@55052_2<br>prop@55057_2
|ss2=prop@55052_2<br>prop@55057_2
|ss3=prop@55052_2<br>prop@55057_2
|ss4=prop@55052_2<br>prop@55057_2
|ss7=prop@55052_2<br>prop@55057_2<br> (Awakened)
}}
